title: Onboarding
description: Onboarding is a workstep in Customer Contact Session responsible for managing the customer interaction associated with establishing a new party relationship with the institution, including the collection, validation, presentation, and submission of information required to initiate and support the customer onboarding process performed by Party Lifecycle Management SD.

OnboardingSessionReference.description: Information used to identify, correlate, and manage the onboarding interaction within the customer dialogue session. It provides the context for tracking the onboarding journey from initiation to completion. Example: Session ID: SD-12345, Onboarding Session ID: ONB-001, Status: Information Gathering, Channel: Mobile Banking

ProspectivePartyInformation.description: The personal, demographic, and relationship information collected from a prospective customer to establish their identity and support the creation of a party record. Example: Name: John Smith, Date of Birth: 15-May-1988, Nationality: Belgian, Residential Address: 10 Main Street, Brussels

IdentificationInformation.description: The information describing the identity credentials and supporting documents provided by the prospective customer for identity verification purposes. Example: Passport Number: AB123456, Issuing Country: Belgium, Expiry Date: 15-May-2032

ContactandCommunicationPreferences.description: The information defining how the prospective customer can be contacted and how they prefer to receive communications from the institution. Example: Email: john.smith@email.com, Mobile: +32xxxxxxx, Preferred Language: English, Preferred Contact Method: Email

OnboardingRequirementsStatus.description: Information used to monitor the completion and validation status of the information, documents, and declarations required before the onboarding request can be submitted for processing. Example: Identity Documents: Complete, Address Verification: Pending, Submission Ready: No

PLMInvocationInformation.description: The details associated with the submission of the onboarding request from Session Dialogue SD to Party Lifecycle Management SD, including references used for tracking and correlation. Example: Request ID: PLM-78901, Invocation Date: 04-Jun-2026, Correlation ID: CORR-45678, Status: Submitted

OnboardingOutcomeInformation.description: The information returned by Party Lifecycle Management SD describing the result of the onboarding process and any resulting party identifiers or next actions. Example: Party ID: P123456, Onboarding Status: Approved, Risk Rating: Low, Next Action: Open Current Account

x-relationships.description: Inherits from Customer Contact Session Workstep
